privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText: Trace values your privacy protection. This privacy policy explains how we collect, store, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.collectionText1: To provide automatic time tracking functionality, we need to collect the following information:
privacy.collectionItem1: Application name and window title of your currently active window (to identify the activity you're currently engaged in)
privacy.collectionItem2: Start time and end time of activities (to calculate duration of time usage)
privacy.collectionItem3: Manually created tasks, habits, and focus session data
privacy.collectionItem4: Your configured application settings and personal preferences
privacy.collectionText2: All this information is used to provide time tracking, classification statistics, and visualization functionality locally on your device. We do not proactively upload this information to our servers.
privacy.storageText1: In the desktop app, all data is stored by default in a SQLite database on your local device.
privacy.storageText2: Cloud sync will be supported in a future release. When enabled, some data will be encrypted and stored on our servers to support multi-device synchronization. You can disable cloud sync at any time.
privacy.storageText3: We will not upload any personal data to the cloud without your explicit authorization.
privacy.userRightsText: As a user, you have the following rights:
privacy.userRight1: Export all your data at any time (supports JSON, CSV formats), activity data supports custom range PDF export
privacy.userRight2: Delete any or all of your data at any time
privacy.userRight3: Adjust tracking granularity - you can choose to only record app names or record full window titles
privacy.userRight4: Configure an exclusion list - do not track specified applications
privacy.userRight5: Pause or stop automatic tracking at any time
privacy.thirdPartyText: If you configure a third-party AI API key for automatic activity classification, your activity titles will be sent to the corresponding AI service for classification. Please note that these requests are governed by the privacy policy of the corresponding AI service. We do not store your API key on our servers (your API key is stored only on your local device).
privacy.childrenText: Our product is not intended for children under the age of 14. If we discover that we have collected information from a child under 14, we will delete it immediately.
privacy.changesText: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. When material changes occur, we will notify you within the app.
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions or suggestions about this privacy policy, you can contact us by submitting an Issue on our GitHub repository.

onboarding.privacyConsentSubtitle: Please read and agree to the following per privacy regulations
onboarding.privacyConsentPoint1: • Trace will record information about your currently active window on your local device for automatic time tracking
onboarding.privacyConsentPoint2: • **All tracking data is stored completely on your local device** - Trace will never automatically upload any data to cloud servers
onboarding.privacyConsentPoint3: • You can adjust your privacy tracking level anytime in Settings, and you can export or delete all data at any time
onboarding.privacyConsentNote: By clicking the checkbox below, you indicate your consent to this privacy collection statement. If you do not agree, automatic tracking features will not be available.
onboarding.privacyConsentAgree: I have read and agree to the privacy statement above
onboarding.pleaseConsent: Please read and agree to the privacy statement before continuing
